name: SES AI Corp
business: SES AI Corp is a developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal and Lithium-ion rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems, Urban Air Mobility, drones, robotics, electric vehicles, and other applications. The company also offers access to its AI-based platform, Molecular Universe, for battery materials discovery and as a software product. Revenue outside the United States was 99% of total revenue for the year ending December 31, 2025, with three customers accounting for 48%, 15%, and 12% of revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal (Li-Metal) and Lithium-ion (Li-ion) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), Urban Air Mobility (UAM), drones, robotics, electric vehicles (EVs), and other applications.

We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal (Li-Metal) and Lithium-ion (Li-ion) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), Urban Air Mobility (UAM), drones, robotics, electric vehicles (EVs), and other applications.
We believe that drones are a perfect fit for high energy density and high-power density Li-Metal and Li-ion batteries.

We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal (Li-Metal) and Lithium-ion (Li-ion) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), Urban Air Mobility (UAM), drones, robotics, electric vehicles (EVs), and other applications.

We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal (Li-Metal) and Lithium-ion (Li-ion) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), Urban Air Mobility (UAM), drones, robotics, electric vehicles (EVs), and other applications.
These expenses also cover depreciation, allocated facilities expenses, and information technology costs, including costs incurred for renting graphic processing units (GPUs) to train AI models.

Our plan to develop NDAA-compliant manufacturing capacity for drone cells is intended to position us to capture new business from [U.S. government and defense-related customers], which we believe could be a driver of future revenue growth.

We also manufacture and supply high energy and power density Li-Metal and Li-ion cells which can be used for drones, UAM, robotics and EV applications, which are regularly improved through research powered by Molecular Universe.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of UZ Energy completed on September 15, 2025
Expect to begin supplying materials manufactured through the Hisun joint venture in the second half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin supplying materials manufactured through the Hisun joint venture in the second half of 2026.
